changes.reason: The enabled extended-VWAP rejection signature missed two deep-MAE rows only because RSI slope exceeded the current 3.6 cap: one at 4.0863 MAE -403.2 and one at 8.942 MAE -379.8. Expanding to 4.1 is the smallest useful boundary nudge and avoids the very broad 8.942 expansion that would likely catch too many momentum winners.

expected_effect: Should test whether the prior successful surgical-veto boundary family can remove or reclassify one additional deep-heat row while preserving the pullback, 1DTE, squeeze, and charm-wall engines. Main tradeoff is possible loss of a small number of high-RSI-slope recoveries; reject if protected fast extended-VWAP winners are materially reduced or net profit falls below 98% of run_029.
label: extended-vwap-rsi-boundary-probe
rationale: Use exactly one surgical-veto family change because run_029 became the leader from a narrow extended-VWAP rejection boundary nudge, while broad hidden signatures retain only 73-84% of PnL and still leave material MAE. The remaining worst tail set is fully covered by the extended-VWAP near-miss family; this experiment extends only the next-nearest missed boundary, not a global entry filter or profile TP change.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long owns the current global worst MAE at -513.4 while still contributing $1261.5 over 34 trades. Static broad filters overlap protected extended-VWAP winners, so this is better expressed as a path-aware classifier if more static boundary nudges fail.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Can overfit a small number of delayed recoveries or block clean high-extension winners unless protected fast-winner retention is explicitly validated.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to make early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98% of leader, and slow_12h_trades at 0.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: This is a short, high-win-rate, take-profit-only sample with no realized losses and no slow >=12h trades. Risk is hidden mainly in intratrade heat and delayed recovery, not real...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -513.4 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL and >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners.

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= current $1305, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.9, and total net profit remains >=98% of leader.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Wall Pin Avoid Dormant Activation Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin worst MAE while total net profit remains >=98% of leader.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Companion Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Retain >=90% pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE from -403.2 and keeping total PnL/exposure hour flat or better.
